articles.author: Sarah Jane Tribble
articles.title: 'We'll never know if he could have been saved.' The gaps in Trump's rural health fund - NPR
articles.description: Republicans promise that $50 billion in new health funding will help rural America. But it's not expected to aid the years-long effort in North Carolina's Martin County to reopen its only hospital.
articles.content:
WILLIAMSTON, N.C. Two years after her brother's death, Debra Pierce still wonders whether the 50-year-old would have survived his heart attack if her local hospital hadn't closed.
"The sad thing is … [+11840 chars]
